channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tinubu Congratulates Mike Adenuga on His 73rd Birthday and Business Achievements
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don hail Mike Adenuga, di chairman of Globacom and Conoil, as e celebrate him 73rd birthday. Tinubu tok say Adenuga na big businessman wey don make mark for different sectors lik...

item.title: Hospital staff held hostage during emergency department incident raises safety concerns
item.description: Last Wednesday, a 35-year-old man under a psychiatric treatment order held eight Canberra Hospital staff hostage in the emergency department's behavioural assessment unit for three hours. Staff were t...

item.title: King Charles entertains Trump and guests during White House state dinner with humour and historical references
item.description: King Charles delighted guests at a state dinner held at the White House, hosted by President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump, marking the first of Trump's second-term celebrations and the US...

item.title: Current Situation of the Middle East Conflict as of April 29, 2026
item.description: As of April 29, 2026, the situation in the Middle East remains tense with ongoing conflicts involving multiple parties, including the United States and Iran. Reports indicate heightened military activ...

item.title: House of Representatives Resumes Proceedings on Impeachment Complaints Against Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: The House of Representatives has resumed its hearing on the impeachment complaints filed against Vice President Sara Duterte. Lawmakers from the House Justice Panel are examining the allegations prese...

item.title: Seven-Year-Old Girl Rescued in Kinoo Following Viral Abuse Video
item.description: In Kinoo, Kiambu County, there was a huge relief after a seven-year-old girl named Vanessa was rescued from an abusive environment. The case came to light when a distressing video showing her being mi...

item.title: eThekwini Municipality Continues Investigation Into Alleged Assaults by Ensure Security Guards
item.description: Two months after CCTV footage emerged showing a homeless man being assaulted by Ensure Security guards in Durban's inner city, the eThekwini Municipality says its investigation into the matter is stil...

item.title: Canada's 2026 Spring Economic Update Highlights Budget Deficit and New Spending Plans
item.description: Finance Minister François-Philippe Champagne presented the 2026 Spring Economic Update, revealing a smaller-than-expected federal budget deficit of $66.9 billion for the fiscal year. Despite the lower...

item.title: King Charles Calls on U.S. to Strengthen NATO Support and Global Engagement
item.description: During a historic address to a joint session of the U.S. Congress—the first by a British monarch in over 30 years—King Charles III highlighted the importance of transatlantic unity and international c...

item.title: Israeli Opposition Forms New Party to Challenge Netanyahu Ahead of 2026 Elections
item.description: Israeli politics may be approaching a turning point as a new opposition alliance forms to challenge long-serving Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Former prime ministers Naftali Bennett and Yair Lapi...

item.title: Nenadi Usman formally elected as Labour Party national chairperson
item.description: The Labour Party (LP) don officially elect Nenadi Usman as their substantive national chairman during the party's national convention wey hold for Umuahia, Abia State on Tuesday. Before this, she been...

item.title: LTFRB orders bus operator to explain Camarines Sur accident
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has issued a show-cause order to Raymond Transportation after one of its buses was involved in a road accident in Camarines Sur. The op...

item.title: FIDO Alliance Develops Standards to Secure AI-Powered Payments
item.description: With AI agents increasingly acting on behalf of users, security concerns around digital transactions are growing. The FIDO Alliance, in collaboration with Google and Mastercard, is forming two working...

item.title: Delta Governor Advises NYSC Corps Members on Discipline, Skills, and Community Impact
item.description: Delta State Governor, Sheriff Oborevwore, don advise all NYSC 2026 Batch ‘A’ Stream II corps members make dem service year beta and prepare dem for better future. He talk for opening ceremony for NYSC...

item.title: Estates of Noel Redding and Mitch Mitchell Fail to Claim Rights to 1960s Hendrix Recordings
item.description: The estates of Noel Redding and Mitch Mitchell, former members of the Jimi Hendrix Experience, have lost a long-running legal dispute against Sony Music Entertainment UK. The estates sought recognitio...

item.title: Study finds ability grouping benefits high-achievers without harming lower-attaining pupils
item.description: A recent study conducted by the UCL Institute of Education, supported by the Education Endowment Foundation (EEF), has found that grouping pupils by ability in mathematics classes improves outcomes fo...

item.title: Xyriel Manabat Shares Insights from Working on '18th Rose'
item.description: Xyriel Manabat, a young and talented actress in the Philippine entertainment industry, recently shared her experiences while working on the film '18th Rose.' In an exclusive interview with ABS-CBN's P...

item.title: Mwanaidy Shishi Addresses Rumours About Her Marriage With Hassan Mugambi
item.description: Mwanaidy Shishi, the wife of journalist Hassan Mugambi, has come out publicly to dismiss circulating rumours that their marriage is facing trouble. The speculations started after popular blogger Edgar...

item.title: Three Accused Remain in Custody Following Newark Family Massacre
item.description: Three men linked to the brutal killing of seven members of the Monswamy family in Newark, KwaZulu-Natal, have decided to withdraw their bail applications due to safety concerns. Appearing at the KwaDu...

item.title: Impact of West Asia Conflict on India’s Diamond Industry and Workers
item.description: The ongoing conflict in West Asia has significantly impacted India’s diamond industry, particularly in Surat, which employs around 8 to 10 lakh workers. Previously, the United Arab Emirates served as ...
